source_pr.title: lightning: fix uuid panic when expression index enabled
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/44497

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
Add `e.SessionCtx.Vars.TxnCtx` when getting default value for column with default expression.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
manually load data with uuid and it works.

Side effects

- None

Documentation

- None

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
lightning: fix the problem that lightning crashes when target table has a column whose default value is uuid
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: race = "on",.
analysis:
PR title: lightning: fix uuid panic when expression index enabled
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/44516
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (6): br/pkg/lightning/backend/kv/BUILD.bazel, br/pkg/lightning/backend/kv/base.go, br/pkg/lightning/backend/kv/sql2kv_test.go, br/tests/lightning_generated_columns/data/gencol.uuid-schema.sql, br/tests/lightning_generated_columns/data/gencol.uuid.0.sql, br/tests/lightning_generated_columns/run.sh
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
